subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Grandeur proclaimeth amidst all created things, saying: O God of the worlds and Sovereign of eternity, I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان لسان العظمه بین البریه ینادی و یقول یا اله العالم و مالک القدم اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @love as fire, @light and darkness
